creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
Commit #d9a42747950146bf03cda7f6e25d219253f8a57a changed lots of .depend files, and some of the changes are creation of empty files. As a result, stale depends warnings being generated during buildworld (snip follows):

===> cddl/lib/libzfsbootenv (all)
make[5]: /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/cddl/lib/libzfsbootenv/.depend, 1: ignoring stale .depend for /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/cddl/lib/libzfs/libzfs_pie.a
make[5]: /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/cddl/lib/libzfsbootenv/.depend, 1: ignoring stale .depend for /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/cddl/lib/libnvpair/libnvpair_pie.a
===> lib/libclang_rt/stats_client (all)
===> cddl/lib/pam_zfs_key (all)
===> lib/libclang_rt/tsan (all)
make[5]: /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/cddl/lib/pam_zfs_key/.depend, 1: ignoring stale .depend for /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/cddl/lib/libzfs/libzfs_pie.a
make[5]: /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/cddl/lib/pam_zfs_key/.depend, 1: ignoring stale .depend for /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/cddl/lib/libzfs_core/libzfs_core_pie.a
make[5]: /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/cddl/lib/pam_zfs_key/.depend, 1: ignoring stale .depend for /usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/cddl/lib/libnvpair/libnvpair_pie.a

I'm not an expert in buildworld, but it still looks odd for me to have empty .depend in-tree.
